channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Long-term food x EF egg patch fix
item.description: Fixes long-term foods broken egg patches for expanded foods

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Weapon Pack Alpha - Rebalanced
item.description: Ever used this legendary mod and thought some things were too OP or weak? this should fix that.

item.title: Combat Impact
item.description: Combat Impact overhauls the default thud sound produced when hitting an enemy with a weapon.

item.title: Jelly Bundle
item.description: A compilation of tweaks for the Swamp Jelly server.

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic crafting system that completely replaces the UI grid with a more immersive mechanic

item.title: Flower Seeds
item.description: Use a knife to turn flowers into seeds!

item.title: Immersive Backpacks
item.description: A complete immersive overhaul of backpacks in Vintage Story.

item.title: tweaks for pell's server
item.description: tweaks for pell's server

item.title: fish(wastaken)'s Classes
item.description: some classes I made, using features taken from GlooMeClasses and Rustbound Magic.

item.title: No Indoor Fog Fix
item.description: Get rid of fog in your home! Increases fog distance from your camera when you are "indoors"

item.title: Alternative armor designs
item.description: With this mod, you can make use of all vanilla armor designs for each respective armor pieces.

item.title: TinkerTailor - Backpacks
item.description: More backpacks & pouches for the veteran seraph. Made with love & pain, No AI.

item.title: Dyed Armor
item.description: Ever wanted a set of colorful armor without being a "Tailor"? now you can!

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: Plant Fiber Hide
item.description: A plant based alternative for animal hides

item.title: VS Roofing Mod
item.description: Gridless roof crafting and build system.

item.title: Vampirism
item.description: Become a creature of the night, drink blood, see in the dark and never touch silver again

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Animalica - Compatibility
item.description: Adds a small list of modded animals as players!

item.title: Pyrogenesis continued
item.description: Adaptation

item.title: Dyed Wood
item.description: Adds stained variants of every vanilla wooden plank while preserving each wood's natural grain.

item.title: Frontiers RPG
item.description: An ARPG system for Vintage Story

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: WOO³
item.description: A modpack that contains custom content and server tweaks for the Whispers of Oldwood season 3.

item.title: Bacon Bacon Bacon
item.description: The first and (so far) only entirely and ridiculously bacon-centric mod for Vintage Story

item.title: Re-Reforged Tools
item.description: A fork of ODs's Reforged Tools updated for 1.22

item.title: Remove Snow Collision
item.description: Removes layered snow collision boxes.

item.title: Real Smoke & QP's Chisel Tools Compatibility Patch 1.22
item.description: Adds compatibility between Real Smoke and QP Chisel Tools decorative blocks.
